data.name: Arbor Realty Trust, Inc.
data.description: Arbor Realty Trust, Inc. invests in a diversified portfolio of structured finance assets in the multifamily, single-family rental, and commercial real estate markets in the United States. It operates in two segments, Structured Business and Agency Business. data.name: ABVC BioPharma, Inc.
data.description: ABVC BioPharma, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, develops drugs and medical devices to fulfill unmet medical needs in the United States.
